title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates:
BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates!
